name: ADS1118 4-Channel 16-Bit A/D Converter with Internal Temperature Sensor
description: ADS1118 4-Channel 16-Bit A/D Converter ([datasheet](https://www.ti.com/lit/ds/symlink/ads1118.pdf)) The `ads1118` domain creates a global hub so that you can later create individual sensors using the [ADS1118 Sensor Platform](https://esphome.io/components/sensor/ads1118#ads1118-sensor). It uses the [SPI Bus](https://esphome.io/components/spi) for communication.

config_entries.label: CS Pin
config_entries.description: The SPI cable select pin to use.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this ADS1118 Hub. Use this if you want to use multiple ADS1118 hubs at once.
